# AxionOS Third-Party Source Offer (V1)

AxionOS distributes open-source third-party components with source-code offer compliance. Source materials and build recipes are provided per license obligations.

## notepad_plus_plus
- Source code offer: available
- Delivery channel: bundle request workflow and published source index

## libreoffice_suite
- Source code offer: available
- Delivery channel: bundle request workflow and published source index

## gimp_engine
- Source code offer: available
- Delivery channel: bundle request workflow and published source index

## inkscape_engine
- Source code offer: available
- Delivery channel: bundle request workflow and published source index

## scribus_engine
- Source code offer: available
- Delivery channel: bundle request workflow and published source index
